author: J S
review:
I have been very happy as a home owner that hired Omni Property Management to manage my rental for two years.
Lacey and the team of ladies are super responsive and professional.

ownerResponse.text:
Thank you so much for your kind words. It was an absolute pleasure working with you and we wish the best of luck on your next adventure. 
-Lacey

Living long distance it's difficult to manage my property, so I require a

author: Ben Moeling
review: From an owner's perspective, Omni has been excellent. They managed a quick and effective marketing effort and found good tenants. They seem equally concerned about our tenants' well-being and comfort, and helped us act fast to solve a

author: a lopez
review: I called OMNI to inquire about their properties and processes but Lacey was less than helpful. She seemed short and rude.  No customer service whatsoever, straight to nonsense.  I had to repeatedly rephrase the question for her to

ownerResponse.text:
Ms. Lopez,
I apologize that you were not satisfied with your interaction with myself and our company today. I was having a hard time hearing your questions as you were asking them due to our connection which is why I was asking them to be repeated. I also wanted to clarify the questions being asked so that I could properly answer them.  I believe the other miss understanding may have stemmed from, based on what you told me, you are relocating here from out of state and things run a bit differently in WA.
I would be happy to try and assist you in anyway we can if you would like to phone back.

Thank you,
Lacey Lutjemeier,
Operations Manager
OMNI Property Management LLC.

author: Kevin Coggan
review: We have been renters with OMNI for two years and they have always been professional, courteous and responsive. Fortunately, there have only been a few minor problems with our rental unit (mostly plumbing). They were fixed in a timely manner

ownerResponse.text: We are sorry to hear you had such a bad previous experience and we hope that we will continue to fulfill your expectations and beyond. Thank you!

author: Kelley Jasper
review: Between my roommate and I, we've experienced 5, perhaps 6 different Bellingham property management companies - more if you count when they changed hands - in 10 years.

ownerResponse.text: Kelley, it is always a pleasure to have long term clients like yourself and hope to continue on for many more years. Cheers!

author: Carmen Williams
review: Working with Lacey at OMNI Property Management has been a delightful, stress free experience! She is professional, straightforward, and easy to communicate with. We look forward to working with her for many years to come and highly recommend OMNI Property Management.

ownerResponse.text:
Carmen,
Thank you for taking the time to leave this lovely review! We hope you are enjoying your home and we look forward to working with you as well.

Thanks,
Lacey Lutjemeier
Operations & Property Manager
OMNI Property Management

author: Luke LeViere
review: We've rented with Omni for over two years now. It has always been simple and easy communicating with Lacey. When there were problems with the heater they sent someone out right away to fix the problem. They've also been on top of minor things like trimming an overgrown bush and fixing the blinds.

author: joseph tedesco
review: Omni has been managing my rental home for almost three years. Whenever I have a repair problem, Lacey has gotten people to the house quickly and the problems have been satisfactorily resolved. I'm thinking about purchasing another home in Bellingham, and if I do, I would have Omni manage it.

ownerResponse.text: Joe, thank you for your kind review. It is easy to do great work when you have great clients. Cheers!

author: Russell Chan
review: I own property at a condominium in Birch Bay and a house in Lynden.  Although you aren't supposed to discriminate when it comes to housing, I also feel that you don't have to tolerate the bullsh!t from bad tenants wrecking a place.  I

author: Drew Gorman
review: Omni Property Management has been a great company to rent from. They are responsive to any questions and care/maintenance that has been needed. I look forward to a long relationship with you guys in staying at my rental.

ownerResponse.text: Thank you for your kind words. We hope to have more wonderful tenants like yourself.

author: robert warren
review: Omni property recently took over the management of my property in Bellingham and soon after my tenant of many years relocated for work. In less than 10 days Lacey had found me new and even better tenants and took care of all the details.

review: Omni has been extremely patient with us as first time landlords- explaining the ins and outs renting our house. They have take care of any issues that have arisen quickly and professionally. Highly recommended.

author: Kicks That'sme
review: Dealing with Omni was the absolute worse experience I have ever had renting. Lacy is a nightmare to deal with. Upon moving in we noticed the thermostats did not work, which means if you turned it on to a temperature the apartment would just

ownerResponse.text:
Thank you for sharing your feedback. Were sorry your experience didnt match your expectations. It was an uncommon instance and we will strive to do better in the future.

Please feel free to reach out to me directly with any further comments, concerns, or suggestions you wish to share. We would love for you to give us another chance, but understand that not all business relationships are able to be resolved in a way that feels positive for all parties involved. We truly wish you the best of luck and happiness in your endeavors.
Lacey Lutjemeier
Operations Manager
OMNI Property Management

author: addie moa
review: It was a complicated situation but it was okay.. they handled our landlords pretty well. This comment wasn't anything bad against omni. And that is why I stated it was complicated.. im sorry you feel it was unfair.

ownerResponse.text:
Addie, 
A review of our company where the issues predated our involvement seems a bit unfair. We did our best to handle the difficult situation that we came in on as professionally as possible. 
We wish you the best of luck in your future endeavors. 

OMNI Property Management

author: TIM James
review: Omni has been very easy to work with and has allowed me to rent my property worry free. Lacey at Omni has had great communication and been able to find great tenants.

ownerResponse.text: We appreciate your kind words. Great communication from our clients is always helpful and you have been no exception. Thank you!

author: Falicia Schallenberger
review: They were horrible to communicate with, for some reason she would only reply to my husband when I was the one messaging her. Also, the deposit was very high. And when we wanted to clean the carpets before we left they said we couldnt, then

ownerResponse.text:
Falicia,
I am sorry to hear that you had a bad experience, but I believe it may have been with a different OMNI Property Management. I do not have any record of you in our system. We are located in Bellingham WA. Also as a woman own and run company I can assure that we respect women and do not have any disillusionment about men being superior or the "Head of the house hold." I hope that you will have better luck with rentals in the future.
Best of Luck,
Lacey Lutjemeier
Owner/Operations Manager
OMNI Property Management

author: Sheri Rego
review: Lacey is very professional and efficient.  She gave us choices as a landlord that other property management companies did not.  She listens to concerns and ideas, and she always responds promptly to questions and comments.

Thank you for taking the time to leave us a review! You are always such a delight and I am happy to be on this rental journey with you.

author: Kyle Rickards
review: It has been a breath of fresh air working with a property management company that has integrity. The team at Omni has been responsive and communicated clearly in all of our interactions.

ownerResponse.text: Thank you so much for your kind words! We love helping all our clients and look forward to work with you further.

author: Jenny Tang
review: Im a property owner and have great experience with Omni management so far. My previous tenants moved out due to COVID and they were able to find another tenant within a month without me losing rent income. I had a nightmare experience with Windermere in the past and this is much better and I recommend it.

author: Kayla Lambert
review: Great management company to work with.  I was a first time renter but they made the process super easy and were very friendly, especially while I was trying to find a place during the peak of the pandemic.  Thoughourghly enjoyed my year with them!!  I'd highly recommend them for any future renters

ownerResponse.text: Kayla, thank you for taking the time to leave such kind word. We wish you all the best in your current endeavors and hope you will come see us again if you need a rental in the Whatcom County area! Thanks!

author: Jamey Smith
review: Very friendly people. Always helpful and courteous.

author: Glenn Josund
review: As an absentee landlord Ive been very happy with Omni Property Managements services. I appreciate their diligence and professionalism. Highly recommended.

author: Marta G
review: As property owners we are impressed with OMNI Property Management's top-notch professionalism and courtesy.  We are also glad to know our tenants are receiving the same service.

author: Don Bakkensen
review: The rental market is tough for finding a place with good neighbors.  I was not only treated with the outmost respect I was put in a building with great neighbors at a decent rent.  So far I have had a good response for any issues I have had.

author: Kyle LaRoche
review: OMNI declined rental application based on arbitrary requirements. Dont expect to be treated with respect or for the company to follow rental requirements when deciding to rent out a unit. According to the owners we were not the right tenant for the place and the owners just didnt like us.

ownerResponse.text:
Kyle,
We understand it is quiet frustrating when an application is not approved and we are sorry that we were not able to better assist you in your search for housing. These are troubling times currently and therefore extra caution is necessary to ensure we are making the best decisions for long term tenancy. I know this is not a consolation but perhaps there is another unit that we manage that would better work.  We wish you the best of luck in your search and hope that we could have the chance to renew your confidence in our company.   Please feel free to contact me directly if there is something more we can do for you.

Lacey Lutjemeier, Operation Manager
OMNI Property Management

author: Sheri Emerson
review: "Lacey at Omni has been super to work this.  In addition to finding really good renters, we appreciate her great communication and how quickly she and her team address any issues or questions that come up.

ownerResponse.text: It is always a pleasure to serve great clients like yourself! Thank you!

review: Omni has a prompt and courteous dealing with property tenants.  Lacey has gone the extra mile to resolve any outstanding issues.

author: Cole De Zarn
review: Horrible Customer service. Not easy to deal with & very unprofessional.

~Lacey Lutjemeier, Operations Manager
OMNI Property Management
